facts_pipeline_890850275513.content: Chore tasks can still have meaningful build verification — the build stage here confirmed decompose creates worktrees and triggers parallel builds even when source files pre-exist.

conventions_kody_890851563880.content: The decompose pipeline requires complexity_score >= 4 and decomposable: true to trigger sub-task splitting; these thresholds are enforced in status.json.

conventions_kody_890853194610.content: Decompose expects 2+ sub-tasks, parallel builds, and a PR body with a 'Decomposed Implementation' section as part of its verification contract.

thoughts_kody_890854585211.content: Without prior decompose runs, globbing for decompose log files in the task directory will return nothing — logs only appear after decompose executes.
